name: deep-sea-embers
description: A high-performance fishing game for WeChat Mini Game and H5

scripts.build:wechat: vite build --mode wechat && copy game.json dist_wechat\ && copy game.js dist_wechat\ && copy weapp-adapter.js dist_wechat\ && powershell -Command "Remove-Item -Path dist_wechat/assets -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Path dist_wechat/*.png -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue"
